[[File:Freeworlds_Common_Navy_officer.png|thumb|left|100px|Freeworlds Common Navy officer]]
The '''Freeworlds Common Navy''' was the [[Judicial Forces/Legends|military]] body charged with defense of the [[Freeworlds Territory]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. During the height of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] it consisted of [[Tapani-class assault frigate|''Tapani''-class assault frigates]] and [[Tapani-class carrier|''Tapani''-class carriers]], each with a standard complement of 40 [[Manta-class assault starfighter|''Manta''-class assault starfighters]]. Backing these up were numerous smaller vessels including [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruisers]], and [[Corvette/Legends|Corvettes]]. Its [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] fleet also included [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s, [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], and [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]].

Financed by the five primary planets of the Freeworlds through the [[League of Tapani Freeworlds]], the fleet was responsible for patrol of the vital [[Shapani Bypass]] to keep the flow of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]] from [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]] uninterrupted. It worked to supplement the units placed there by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]—as well as keep the [[House Guard]] of the [[Tapani Noble Houses]] out of the Freeworlds.
